# rejectDatabaseTransfer

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for rejectDatabaseTransfer

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useRejectDatabaseTransferMutation(); mutate({ input: { transferId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useRejectDatabaseTransferMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useRejectDatabaseTransferMutation();
mutate({ input: { transferId: '<UUID>' } });
```
